programmes.show_description: This week Lucy heads to Spain's Costa del Sol to live with ex-Eastenders actress Danniella Westbrook. Danniella talks through her troubled past and her plans for the future. (SL,HD)
A woman falls for an architect and gets an eerie premonition about his house, when she finds out that another woman died there. With Gugu Mbatha-Raw & David Oyelowo. (HD)
